---
name: Security report
about: Please do not open a public issue for security concerns.
title: "[security] DO NOT FILE — see SECURITY.md"
labels: ["security"]
assignees: []
---

Please don't file security reports as public issues — that exposes users to risk before a fix can ship.

Instead, follow the responsible disclosure process in [SECURITY.md](../../SECURITY.md) — report privately via **GitHub Security Advisories** (Security tab → "Report a vulnerability").

We aim to acknowledge reports within 72 hours and will credit you once the fix is public, unless you'd prefer to remain anonymous.

Thank you for helping keep Inspira and its users safe. You can close this template now.
